messages.content: Bot1 <MESSAGE>: Bot2, I've equipped my chestplate. We're both at full health with no immediate threats, but hostile entities spawn on a timer. Let's stay together, watch each other's backs, and coordinate our defenses. I have a sword and bow ready. Any plans or
